news.t: Own a muni ETF? Here's what midterm elections mean for the municipal bond market, according to this investment team
IndexIQ Launches IQ MacKay California Municipal Intermediate ETF

overview.description: The NYLI MacKay California Muni Intermediate ETF (MMCA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests primarily in investment-grade, intermediate-term municipal bonds that are exempt from federal and California income taxes. MMCA was launched on Dec 21, 2021 and is issued by New York Life Investments.

data.title: Own a muni ETF? Here's what midterm elections mean for the municipal bond market, according to this investment team
data.text: U.S. midterm elections have MacKay Municipal Managers, a team of municipal bond investors at MacKay Shields, watching closely for state ballot initiatives that may lead to policy change.

data.title: IndexIQ Launches IQ MacKay California Municipal Intermediate ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IndexIQ has launched MMCA, focused on California munis, actively managed by MacKay Municipal Managers, the municipal bond team at MacKay Shields LLC
